Home.title: Unlock USDC from your creator token.
Home.subtitle: Creator tokens are sold at opening. Realized USDC secures senior lenders, while junior underwriters cover capped synthetic upside.
Home.riskTitle: A capped synthetic is not guaranteed redemption.

Borrow.title: Open a capped creator-token position
Borrow.description: Quotes are based on an executed sale, never on market cap or an unverified spot price.
Borrow.sale: The Creator Token will be sold when the position opens.
Borrow.reserve: USDC from the sale will remain locked in the position.
Borrow.loan: You will receive a separate USDC loan from the Senior Vault.
Borrow.cap: Synthetic exposure is covered only up to the displayed cap.
Borrow.topUp: Above the cap, you may need to add USDC to recover the full amount.
Borrow.partial: Alternatively, you may receive fewer Creator Tokens.
Borrow.default: On default, the synthetic right is lost.
Borrow.execution: Liquidity, slippage, and fees can affect the amount received.
Borrow.economicRisk: The protocol does not eliminate the Creator Token’s economic risk.
Borrow.contractRisk: Smart contracts and integrations can fail.

AppShell.testnetNotice: Testnet interface. Contracts are not deployed and no funds can be deposited.

AppPages.overviewDescription: Positions, vault deposits, hedge epochs and activity derived from Base Sepolia.
AppPages.lendDescription: ERC-4626 shares accrue realized borrower interest. Withdrawals depend on available cash; queued claims are not instantly liquid.
AppPages.underwriteDescription: Capital is locked while positions remain exposed. Premium and downside PnL come with the risk of losing capital when creator tokens rise.
AppPages.marketsDescription: Every market is read from bounded on-chain risk configuration. Mainnet remains disabled.
AppPages.positionsDescription: Inspect debt, maturity, reserve, junior coverage and currently available settlement routes.

LendPanel.deploymentText: No transaction is enabled until verified contract addresses are published.
LendPanel.queueDescription: Queueing transfers shares into FIFO escrow until cash returns.
LendPanel.connect: Connect a wallet to load balances and transact.

UnderwritePanel.deploymentText: Epoch transactions activate only after verified addresses are published.
UnderwritePanel.risk: Junior capital can lose value and cannot exit while linked positions remain open.

MarketsPanel.deploymentText: Markets appear only after a verified Creator Token and RiskManager are published from the deployment manifest.
MarketsPanel.loading: Reading market configuration from Base Sepolia…
MarketsPanel.disabledText: The configured Creator Token is not enabled by on-chain governance.

PositionsPanel.deploymentText: Verified Base Sepolia addresses must be published before on-chain positions can be read.
PositionsPanel.connectText: Positions are read directly from the PositionManager and filtered by the connected owner.
PositionsPanel.networkText: MuseLend testnet positions are available on chain 84532.
PositionsPanel.emptyText: Change the state filter or inspect older protocol position batches.

BorrowPanel.tokenHelp: Only canonical, enabled Zora Creator Tokens are accepted.
BorrowPanel.insufficientBalance: Amount exceeds the connected wallet balance.
BorrowPanel.simulationError: Simulation failed. Verify the epoch, liquidity, caps and quote freshness; no transaction was sent.
BorrowPanel.partialText: Above the cap, you may need to add USDC to recover the full amount. Otherwise the protocol may return fewer tokens. Liquidity, slippage and fees affect the result.
BorrowPanel.deploymentMissing: Verified Base Sepolia addresses are not published yet. The app validates inputs but cannot prepare a transaction.
BorrowPanel.integrationMissing: The verified swap adapter and interest-rate model addresses must be published before quote simulation is enabled.
BorrowPanel.tokenRejected: This token is not enabled by the protocol validator.
BorrowPanel.quoteUnavailable: No verified sell quote is available.
BorrowPanel.quoteMismatch: Quote does not match the configured adapter.
BorrowPanel.quoteReady: Fresh quote verified. Review every deduction before simulation.
BorrowPanel.quoteFailed: The quote failed safely. No transaction was prepared.

Portfolio.contractsText: Verified Base Sepolia addresses must be published before the portfolio can be loaded.
Portfolio.connectText: Your portfolio is assembled from verified Base Sepolia contracts without custody or off-chain balances.
Portfolio.networkText: MuseLend testnet portfolio data is available on chain 84532.
Portfolio.errorText: The verified Base Sepolia RPC did not return a complete portfolio. Retry after the connection recovers.
Portfolio.emptyText: Open a capped position or allocate Base Sepolia USDC to a MuseLend vault.
Portfolio.noRecent: No owned positions in the latest protocol window.
